name: Corn Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the corn, minced onions, chopped red bell pepper, honey, cider vinegar, dry mustard, and dill seed.
2. Mix until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Pack the mixture into one or two glass jars, ensuring they are tightly sealed.
5. Allow the relish to sit at room temperature for at least 2 hours before serving, or up to 2 days in advance if stored properly.
